name: Mental Models
purpose: Surface the cognitive frameworks and mental models present in or applicable to this content
questions: What mental models does the author use explicitly or implicitly?
Which of Munger's 98 models best explain the core ideas here?
What thinking traps or biases are present?
How do these models connect into a latticework?
projectContextHints: Look for both explicit and implicit use of mental models
Note where the author avoids useful models they could have used
